#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p .eval-fixtures
cat > .eval-fixtures/task.sh <<'SH'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
rm -f bin/platform.test.ts
SH
bash .eval-fixtures/task.sh
